how are you
I'm doing well, thanks for asking, Moksh. I'm ready to help you with any questions or tasks you may have.
cut the phone
I'm not capable of controlling your phone, Moksh, but I can tell you to hang up if you'd like.
jarvising up the phone
That's a clever phrase, Moksh, but I'm not capable of physically controlling your phone or making calls.
Aaj Din Mein क्या-क्या Hua
Moksh, aaj din mein humne bahut si baatein ki, lekin aaj ka din khaas nahin tha, sirf humari chat hi hui.
what do you mean by hello
When I say "hello", Moksh, I mean a greeting, a way to acknowledge you and start our conversation. It's like saying "hi, I'm here and ready to chat with you".
what can you do

Moksh, I can answer questions, open apps or websites, generate images, play music, write content, and search the web for you. I'll do my best to assist you with any task or provide information on a wide range of topics.
how are you
